title: Angry Chickens
description: Chickens can eat your farm and become fat and angry!
body:
This datapack adds new mob - angry chicken. Angry chickens can attack players. Dont let chickens to eat your wheat, if they eat wheat, they would become fat, angry chickens! 
<video src="https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/970341786029555762/1011708955766038661/ezgif.com-gif-maker_1.mp4" controls></video>
<video src="https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/970341786029555762/1011706774363062373/ezgif.com-gif-maker.mp4" controls></video>
If you want to prank your friend, use this command to summon angry chicken near you!
```
/function ts_angrychickens:summon
```
